title: Z-Oz Group
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Oz''' was a pair of [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvettes]] sent to loot [[ZA-13]] by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]]. They carried [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] units that could be placed into [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]]. However they were disabled by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], then boarded by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] boarding parties to recover the cargo, before being destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]''
